title: Role of the innate and adaptive immune responses in the course of multiple sclerosis
rationale: Neuroimmunology depth supplement for Topic 2. Canonical mechanistic review covering Th1/Th17 T-cell subsets B-cell roles beyond antibody production and microglial activation. Recommended for readers needing mechanistic depth beneath the pathology layer.

title: Diagnosis of multiple sclerosis: 2024 revisions of the McDonald criteria
rationale: 2024 McDonald criteria update adding central vein sign paramagnetic rim lesions and kappa free light chains. Immediate follow-on to Topic 1B seed (2017 criteria). Read together as a pair.

title: Multiple sclerosis
rationale: Banwell et al. 2022 Lancet comprehensive review. Most recent broad update covering pediatric alongside adult MS. Living companion to Topic 12A pediatric criteria paper.

title: Population-based estimates for the prevalence of multiple sclerosis in the United States by race ethnicity age sex and geographic region
rationale: Hittle et al. 2023 national US prevalence estimate with geographic stratification. Recommended corpus complement for Topic 13 equity coverage alongside both Langer-Gould seeds.

title: Epstein-Barr virus as a leading cause of multiple sclerosis: mechanisms and implications
rationale: Mechanistic bridge from Topic 4A epidemiological finding (Bjornevik 2022) to proposed pathogenic mechanisms. Covers molecular mimicry EBNA1 and implications for vaccine-based prevention.

title: Multiple sclerosis progression: time for a new mechanism-driven framework
rationale: Conceptual bridge between Topics 8 (smoldering MS) and 15 (emerging frontiers). Argues for mechanism-driven framework replacing phenotype-based classification — directly complements Louapre 2025 reclassification seed.

title: Imaging chronic active lesions in multiple sclerosis: a consensus statement
rationale: Consensus on imaging methodology for chronic active lesions — directly relevant to Topic 5B paramagnetic rim lesion seed (Absinta 2019) and the 2024 McDonald criteria update.

title: Paediatric multiple sclerosis and antibody-associated demyelination: clinical imaging and biological considerations for diagnosis and care
rationale: Companion to Topic 12 pediatric seeds. Covers ADEM MOGAD NMOSD differential with updated imaging criteria; bridges diagnostic criteria (12A) with contemporary clinical management.
